prompts: Hey, how are you doing today?
I heard a joke the other day, do you want to hear it?
Can I ask you something quick?
By the way, do you want to hear this funny thing from work?
Can you give me a quick status of invoice_99x?
I read a long article about sleep and stress; want a quick summary?
Do you want to hear what happened on my drive home?
Can we keep this light for a minute?
Tell me a joke to reset my brain.
I saw a weird headline today, should I share it?
Hey love, do you want to chat for a sec?
